summary: Backend refactoring verification complete. Tested that orders.py correctly uses extracted functions from services/order_pricing.py. All 14 tests passed including: order creation (shipping & self-pickup), coupon validation (no coupons for self-pickup), order status logic, and package calculation.

shipping_order_creation.description: Order creation with delivery_mode='shipping' works, returns session_id and Razorpay order

self_pickup_pay_at_store.description: Self-pickup with token payment (Rs.11) works correctly, balance_at_store calculated

self_pickup_pay_online.description: Self-pickup with full online payment charges full MRP

coupon_not_applied_for_self_pickup.description: Discount codes are ignored for self-pickup mode (coupon_discount=0)

package_calculation.description: calculate_package_details correctly calculates weight with packaging adjustments

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring is clean: validate_and_apply_coupon, get_order_status_for_delivery_mode, calculate_package_details extracted to services/order_pricing.py
orders.py correctly imports and uses the extracted functions (line 66)
TOKEN_AMOUNT constant (Rs.11) properly shared between orders.py and service module
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests use existing products and create payment sessions that are not completed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring verified. Order pricing logic extracted to services/order_pricing.py is working correctly. Checkout flow remains functional. Order creation requires 'sessionId' field (client-generated). Mocked APIs: Instagram feed, Amazon QR code, WhatsApp Business API.
